zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith de Bayeux於0962年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也時，她的父親Balso de Bayeux32歲，母親Judith de Boulogne28歲。她於0979年與Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches在法國豪-諾門迪艾萊斯 安德利斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1015年在法國豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith de Bayeux于0962年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也时，她的父亲Balso de Bayeux32岁，母亲Judith de Boulogne28岁。她于0979年与Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches在法国豪-諾門迪艾萊斯 安德利斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1015年在法国豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bayeux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Landry, Alphonse, Andre, Armand, Colette, Monique, Theophile.
French (northern): from an old form of   Mayeur  . Compare   Mayeaux  .

variants.name: Mayeaux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Clemile, Ferrel.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith de Bayeux was born in 0962, in Bayeux, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Balso de Bayeux, was 32 and her mother, Judith de Boulogne, was 28. She married Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches in 0979, in Les Andelys, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1015, in Tosny, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith de Bayeux est née en 0962, à Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Balso de Bayeux, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Judith de Boulogne, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches en 0979, à Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1015, à Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith de Bayeux 0962 in Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Balso de Bayeux 32 und ihre Mutter Judith de Boulogne 28. Sie hat 0979 in Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1015 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Bayeux è nata il nel 0962 nel Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Balso de Bayeux, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Judith de Boulogne, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches nel 0979, nel Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1015, nel Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith de Bayeuxが0962年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスで生まれた時，父Balso de Bayeuxは32歳，母Judith de Boulogneは28歳であった。0979年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアレス アンデリスでRaoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1015年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアトスニーで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith de Bayeux(이)가 0962년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Balso de Bayeux(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith de Boulogne(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 0979년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 레스 앤들리스에서 Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1015년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 토스니에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Bayeux nasceu em 0962, em Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Balso de Bayeux, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Boulogne, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches em 0979, em Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1015, em Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith de Bayeux родилась в 0962 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Balso de Bayeux было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Judith de Boulogne, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches в 0979 г. в местности лесь анделиз, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1015 г. в местности тосни, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith de Bayeux nació en 0962, en Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Balso de Bayeux, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Judith de Boulogne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches en 0979, en Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1015, en Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
